X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the current window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch seconds when the current window resets

Retry-After.description: Seconds to wait before retrying when limited

get.summary: List all YouTube video configs

post.summary: Create a new YouTube video config
post.description:
Creates a YouTube video configuration for a guild+channel pair.
Allowed fields in request body:
- youtubeChannelId (string, required)
- discordChannelId (string, required)
- guildId (string, required)
- customMessage (string, optional)
- cooldownMinutes (integer >= 0 or null, optional)
- quietHoursStart (HH:mm or null, optional)
- quietHoursEnd (HH:mm or null, optional)

Read-only fields (ignored if provided): lastVideoId, lastNotifiedAt.

put.summary: Upsert a YouTube video config by channel
put.description:
Upserts a YouTube config based on channel identity. Allowed body fields:
- youtubeChannelId (string, required)
- discordChannelId (string, required)
- guildId (string, required)
Other fields like cooldownMinutes/quietHours should be updated via PUT /youtube/{id}.

get.summary: Resolve a YouTube channel identifier (handle/username/UC-Id) to a channelId
Resolve public YouTube channel metadata from the channel Atom feed
Get a YouTube video config by channel

post.summary: Create or update a YouTube video config by channel

get.summary: Get a YouTube video config by id

put.summary: Update a YouTube video config by id
put.description:
Updates a YouTube configuration by id. Allowed fields in request body:
- youtubeChannelId (string)
- discordChannelId (string)
- guildId (string)
- customMessage (string)
- cooldownMinutes (integer >= 0 or null)
- quietHoursStart (HH:mm or null)
- quietHoursEnd (HH:mm or null)

Read-only fields: lastVideoId, lastNotifiedAt.

delete.summary: Delete a YouTube video config by id

post.summary: Resolve minimal user profiles and guild nicknames
post.description:
Given a guildId and up to 50 user IDs, returns minimal user profiles
with optional cached guild nickname where available. Profiles are cached
in the server-side cache. Any IDs that could not be resolved are listed
under `missed`.

200.description: Resolved users and list of missed IDs
